\tzpentry{ID5514}{Document Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5514 introduces Document Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} (x^2 + y^2)^2 = a^2(x^2 - y^2) \end{equation}
